# REQ-FR-260006: Mandatory verification gates for public-site releases

- ID: FR-260006
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-21
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

Every production release of the Crystord public site shall pass a mandatory verification gate set
covering route integrity, link correctness, sign-in target behavior, static-only operation, and
desktop/mobile smoke checks.

## Rationale

Deployment success alone does not ensure the published site is correct. A consistent gate set is
required to protect visitors and release quality.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Mandatory checks are executed before release approval:
  - landing route loads on deployed base path,
  - sign-in target points to configured app-domain entry,
  - Google Add-on, Contact, YouTube, Terms, Privacy, and Support links are valid,
  - public pages do not require runtime backend dependencies,
  - desktop and mobile smoke checks pass.
- Checks run against both local preview and deployed Pages URL.
- Release is blocked if any mandatory check fails.
- Final acceptance sign-off is recorded by repository owner.
- Verification note is retained per release (URL, timestamp, reviewer, results).
